mapper.select: SELECT T1.ID AS id, T1.SUPPLIER_CODE AS supplierCode, T1.COMPANY_ID AS companyId, T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE AS customerType, T1.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.COMPANY_NAME, 4000, 1) AS companyName, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.COMPANY_SHORT, 4000, 1) AS companyShort, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.FORMER_NAME, 4000, 1) AS formerName, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.E_COMPANY_NAME, 4000, 1) AS eCompanyName, T1.INDUSTRY_TYPE AS industryType, T1.COUNTRY AS country, T1.PROVINCE AS province, T1.CITY AS city, T1.REGISTERED_CURRENCY AS registeredCurrency, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.ADDRESS, 4000, 1) AS address, T1.UNIFORM_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE AS uniformSocialCreditCode, T1.ORGANIZATION_CODE AS organizationCode, T1.BUSINESS_TYPE AS businessType, T1.DUNS AS duns, T1.MNEMONIC_CODE AS mnemonicCode, T1.ESTIBLISH_TIME AS estiblishTime, T1.REGISTERED_CAPITAL AS registeredCapital, T1.LEGAL_PERSON AS legalPerson, T1.LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_NO AS legalPersonCardNo, T1.BUSINESS_STATE AS businessState, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.BUSINESS_SCOPE, 4000, 1) AS businessScope, T1.COMPANY_TEL AS companyTel, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.BUSINESS_ADDRESS, 4000, 1) AS businessAddress, T1.LICENSEIMG_URL AS licenseImgUrl, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_IMG1, 4000, 1) AS legalPersonCardImg1, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_IMG2, 4000, 1) AS legalPersonCardImg2, T1.IS_AUTH AS isAuth, T1.STATE AS status, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.REMARK, 4000, 1) AS remark, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.COMPANY_INFO_REMARK, 4000, 1) AS companyInfoRemark, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.SUPPLIER_PERSON, 4000, 1) AS supplierPerson, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.SUPPLIER_PHONE, 4000, 1) AS supplierPhone, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.RELATION_VOID_PERSON, 4000, 1) AS relationVoidPerson, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T1.RELATION_VOID_REASON, 4000, 1) AS relationVoidReason, T1.CREATED_USER AS createBy, T1.CREATED_TIME AS createTime, T1.UPDATE_USER AS updateBy, T1.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_MATERIAL_SUPPLIER T1 WHERE T1.ID = #{id} AND T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE = '1' AND T1.RELATION_VOID_DATE IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_SUPPLIER ( ID, SUPPLIER_CODE, COMPANY_ID, CUSTOMER_TYPE, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_SHORT, FORMER_NAME, E_COMPANY_NAME, INDUSTRY_TYPE, COUNTRY, PROVINCE, CITY, REGISTERED_CURRENCY, ADDRESS, UNIFORM_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE, ORGANIZATION_CODE, BUSINESS_TYPE, DUNS, MNEMONIC_CODE, ESTIBLISH_TIME, REGISTERED_CAPITAL, LEGAL_PERSON, LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_NO, BUSINESS_STATE, BUSINESS_SCOPE, COMPANY_TEL, BUSINESS_ADDRESS, LICENSEIMG_URL, LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_IMG1, LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_IMG2, IS_AUTH, STATE, REMARK, COMPANY_INFO_REMARK, SUPPLIER_PERSON, SUPPLIER_PHONE, SUPPLIER_NAME, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{supplierCode}, #{companyId}, #{customerType}, #{companyName,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{companyShort,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{formerName,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{eCompanyName,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{industryType}, #{country}, #{province}, #{city}, #{registeredCurrency}, #{address,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{uniformSocialCreditCode}, #{organizationCode}, #{businessType}, #{duns}, #{mnemonicCode}, #{estiblishTime}, #{registeredCapital}, #{legalPerson}, #{legalPersonCardNo}, #{businessState}, #{businessScope,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{companyTel}, #{businessAddress,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{licenseImgUrl}, #{legalPersonCardImg1,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{legalPersonCardImg2,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{isAuth}, #{status}, #{remark,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{companyInfoRemark,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{supplierPerson,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{supplierPhone,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{supplierName}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_MATERIAL_SUPPLIER SET SUPPLIER_NAME = #{supplierName}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=CLOB}, COMPANY_SHORT = #{companyShort,jdbcType=CLOB}, FORMER_NAME = #{formerName,jdbcType=CLOB}, E_COMPANY_NAME = #{eCompanyName,jdbcType=CLOB}, INDUSTRY_TYPE = #{industryType}, COUNTRY = #{country}, PROVINCE = #{province}, CITY = #{city}, REGISTERED_CURRENCY = #{registeredCurrency}, ADDRESS = #{address,jdbcType=CLOB}, UNIFORM_SOCIAL_CREDIT_CODE = #{uniformSocialCreditCode}, ORGANIZATION_CODE = #{organizationCode}, BUSINESS_TYPE = #{businessType}, DUNS = #{duns}, MNEMONIC_CODE = #{mnemonicCode}, ESTIBLISH_TIME = #{estiblishTime}, REGISTERED_CAPITAL = #{registeredCapital}, LEGAL_PERSON = #{legalPerson}, LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_NO = #{legalPersonCardNo}, BUSINESS_STATE = #{businessState}, BUSINESS_SCOPE = #{businessScope,jdbcType=CLOB}, COMPANY_TEL = #{companyTel}, BUSINESS_ADDRESS = #{businessAddress,jdbcType=CLOB}, LICENSEIMG_URL = #{licenseImgUrl}, LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_IMG1 = #{legalPersonCardImg1,jdbcType=CLOB}, LEGAL_PERSON_CARD_IMG2 = #{legalPersonCardImg2,jdbcType=CLOB}, IS_AUTH = #{isAuth}, STATE = #{status}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=CLOB}, COMPANY_INFO_REMARK = #{companyInfoRemark,jdbcType=CLOB}, SUPPLIER_PERSON = #{supplierPerson,jdbcType=CLOB}, SUPPLIER_PHONE = #{supplierPhone,jdbcType=CLOB}, UPDATE_USER = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id} AND CUSTOMER_TYPE = '1' AND RELATION_VOID_DATE IS NULL

UPDATE E_MATERIAL_SUPPLIER SET RELATION_VOID_DATE = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RELATION_VOID_PERSON = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=CLOB}, RELATION_VOID_REASON = '黄骅设备系统删除', STATE = '1', UPDATE_USER = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id} AND CUSTOMER_TYPE = '1' AND RELATION_VOID_DATE IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(SUPPLIER_CODE) FROM E_MATERIAL_SUPPLIER WHERE CUSTOMER_TYPE = '1' AND RELATION_VOID_DATE IS NULL AND SUPPLIER_CODE LIKE 'GYS-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-%'

SELECT ( NVL((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE WHERE SUPPLIER_ID = #{id}), 0) + NVL((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WHERE SUPPLIER_ID = #{id}), 0) + NVL((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WHERE SUPPLIER_ID = #{id}), 0) ) FROM DUAL
